report.summary: Fourteenth standup Apr 2: 64 learn guides (+2 since v12). Design-v3 fixed critical tokenomics 'use client' conflict + UX audit on 6 pages. Community-v3 drafted tweets #340-344 covering Liberation Day tariffs ($5T+ S&P wipeout), Drift $286M exploit, extreme fear DCA analysis. Newsletter v21. F&G 8-12 range, BTC $66.2K. Metaplanet bought 5,075 BTC ($405M). 70 agent runs today ($6,516 human-equivalent). P0: commit+deploy still critical — 15 uncommitted files.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v12→v13): 2 new learn pages on disk (64 total, up from 62). No new build cycle ran — content growth came from prior build cycles materializing. Design-v3 polished 6 pages with UX fixes. Community-v3 produced Liberation Day tariff-themed content cycle.

DESIGN-V3 SHIPPED: Fixed critical tokenomics page 'use client' + metadata export conflict (build-breaking). L2 guide: semantic <article> element, scrollMarginTop on all h2s, <nav aria-label> on ToC, JSON-LD moved to top. CL guide: increased ToC touch targets to 44px for mobile accessibility. All 6 today's learn pages verified with OG images.

COMMUNITY-V3 SHIPPED: 5 tweets (#340-344) for Apr 14-19 covering Liberation Day tariff shock ($5T+ S&P wipeout, BTC -3%), DeFi Vaults education, Drift Protocol $286M exploit alert, extreme fear DCA historical analysis (+62% median 90-day return from sub-10 F&G), weekly builder roundup. Newsletter v21 'Liberation Day Shakes Markets, Fear Stays Extreme'. 2 new social card SVGs.

MARKET CONTEXT (LIVE): BTC $66,246-$66,478 (-3%), ETH ~$1,950 (-4.4%), F&G 8-12 (conflicting sources, still extreme fear — 46-60+ consecutive days). Total market cap ~$2.23T-$2.37T. Liberation Day tariffs: 10% baseline on 50+ countries, up to 50% reciprocal, effective Apr 5-9. S&P 500 lost $5T+ (largest single-event wipeout on record).

POSITIVE SIGNALS: Metaplanet purchased 5,075 BTC for $405M — now world's 3rd largest corporate BTC holder (40,177 BTC total). Stablecoin supply $316B ATH with 84.68% of total volume — widest fear-liquidity divergence ever. Historical sub-10 F&G median 90-day return: +62%. Nansen: 70% probability market bottoms by June.

INFRASTRUCTURE: 64 page.tsx files in learn directory. 631 published pages in registry. 109 published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 15 uncommitted files. 6/6 API routes present and structurally healthy.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible from sandbox — all metrics derived from local file analysis + web search + agent reports.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY (v12→v13): 3 agents produced new work since last standup — design-v3 (UX audit + critical build fix on 6 pages), community-v3 (tweets #340-344, newsletter v21, 2 social cards), eod-v9 (QA cycle-close confirming 631 pages, no regressions). No new build or publish cycles ran.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 64 learn guides on disk (+2 since v12). 344 tweets drafted through Apr 19. Newsletter at v21. 7 courses launched. Content pipeline well ahead of deployment — bottleneck remains commit+deploy.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (ESCALATED, 6TH+ STANDUP): 15 uncommitted files including 3 modified source files + 12 new assets. Production last deployed at commit e3f63fc. Design-v3 fixed a build-breaking 'use client' conflict — this fix is trapped in uncommitted state. Every hour of delay = lost organic discovery, especially with Liberation Day driving peak crypto search interest.
P1 — 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX FILES (UNCHANGED 6+ STANDUPS): wallets (18), investing/best (15), taxes (15), learn (27), blog (9), courses (6), others (19). Requires dedicated page-scaffold sprint.
P2 — EULER-V2 MISSING JSON-LD: EOD-v9 identified euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026 lacks JSON-LD structured data (regression gap from build cycle).
P3 — DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Only API route without hardcoded fallback. Unchanged 7+ cycles.
P4 — 141 TS ERRORS: crypto-arbitrage, lido-v3, rwa-yield pages + structured-data.examples.ts. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL): 15 uncommitted files including a build-breaking fix (tokenomics 'use client' removal) trapped in working tree. Liberation Day tariffs just triggered the largest single-event S&P wipeout in history — crypto search demand is spiking NOW. F&G at 8-12 means peak fear = peak search for 'is crypto safe', 'DCA strategy', 'what are tariffs doing to crypto'. Our 64 learn guides + 7 courses are exactly what searchers need, but none of the new content is deployed. Non-negotiable: resolve commit blockers, push all changes, trigger Vercel auto-deploy.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON LIBERATION DAY SEARCH SPIKE: Trump's tariff announcement is the biggest macro story of 2026 so far. Community-v3 already drafted timely content (tweets #340-344, newsletter v21). Deploy enables indexing of our tariff-adjacent guides (stablecoins, DCA, portfolio rebalancing, fear & greed tool). Window is 48-72 hours before search intent decays.

PRIORITY 3 — SCAFFOLD MISSING 109 PAGE.TSX + FIX EULER-V2 JSON-LD: Two structural gaps: (a) 109 published slugs returning 404 on indexed URLs, (b) euler-v2 missing JSON-LD (new regression). Both require code changes but are quick wins once deploy pipeline is unblocked. Start with learn (27) and wallets (18) categories for maximum coverage.

metrics.label: Production Status

report.email: Chrome JS fetch to Resend API blocked (CORS/network restriction from browser context) — consistent with all previous cycles
